revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十六]][[zh:二月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 16|qq=February 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Chengping|en|Chengping|qid=Q11076356|lt=Shōhei|1=Chengping}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|935|en|935|qid=Q24867|lt=935|1=935}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Ki no Tsurayuki|en|Ki no Tsurayuki|qid=Q468288|lt=Kikanu no Kimi|1=Ki no Tsurayuki}} returned from Tosa to Kyoto, concluding the journey described in the {{ill|Tosa Nikki|en|Tosa Nikki|qid=Q844452|lt=Tosa Nikki|1=Tosa Nikki}}. {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * {{ill|Ōwa|en|Ōwa|qid=Q1324768|lt=Ōwa|1=Ōwa}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|961|en|961|qid=Q23881|lt=961|1=961}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}}) – An era change occurred from {{ill|Tiande|en|Tiande|qid=Q10939590|lt=Tendoku|1=Tiande}} to {{ill|Ōwa|en|Ōwa|qid=Q1324768|lt=Ōwa|1=Ōwa}} as a result of the {{ill|Xinyou Revolution|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Metal Rooster) ({{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei|1=Kōhei}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1063|en|1063|qid=Q19400|lt=1063|1=1063}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – After the defeat in the [[Zenken-nen no Eki|前九年の役]], the heads of Abe Sadatomi and Fujiwara Chōki were displayed at the Nishigokumon in Kyoto. * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|qid=Q8432|lt=Bunmei|1=Civilization}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1474|en|1474|qid=Q6600|lt=1474|1=1474}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Ikkyū|en|Ikkyū|qid=Q467613|lt=Ikkyū Sōjun|1=Ikkyū}} assumed the post of abbot at {{ill|Daitoku-ji|en|Daitoku-ji|qid=Q901256|lt=Daitoku-ji|1=Daitoku-ji}}. == Births == * {{ill|Jōō (Kamakura period)|en|Jōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1194163|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Kamakura period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1222|en|1222|qid=Q5397|lt=1222|1=1222}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|qid=Q2460|lt=March 30|1=March 30}}) – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478qid=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}}, the founder of the {{ill|Nichiren-shū|en|Nichiren-shū|qid=Q206611|lt=Nichiren sect|1=Nichiren-shū}} (died {{ill|1282|en|1282|qid=Q5541|lt=1282|1=1282}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1666|en|1666|qid=Q7585|lt=1666|1=1666}} {{ill|March 21|en|March 21|qid=Q2433|lt=March 21|1=March 21}}) – {{ill|Ogyū Sorai|en|Ogyū Sorai|qid=Q369158|lt=Ogio Sora|1=Ogyū Sorai}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1728|en|1728|qid=Q6947|lt=1728|1=1728}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – {{ill|Ōkuma Shigenobu|en|Ōkuma Shigenobu|qid=Q243141|lt=Ōkuma Shigenobu|1=Ōkuma Shigenobu}}, the 8th and 17th Prime Minister of Japan and founder of {{ill|Waseda University|en|Waseda University|qid=Q274486|lt=Waseda University|1=Waseda University}} (died {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|qid=Q2460|lt=March 30|1=March 30}}) – {{ill|Yuasayoshi|ja|湯浅吉郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasayoshi|1=Yuasa Kichiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11563691}}, a biblical scholar and poet (died {{ill|1943|en|1943|qid=Q18623|lt=1943|1=1943}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1190|en|1190|qid=Q19736|lt=1190|1=1190}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Saigyō|en|Saigyō|qid=Q224689|lt=Saigyō|1=Saigyō}}, a Waka poet (born {{ill|1118|en|1118|qid=Q19539|lt=1118|1=1118}}). (Saigyō’s memorial is observed on {{ill|February 15|en|February 15|qid=Q2334|lt=February 15 (Lunisolar)|1=February 15}}.) * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11671324}}, who assisted in the surveying for the Tokugawa shogunate’s {{ill|Tenmongata|en|Tenmongata|qid=Q11442660|lt=Tenmon-kata|1=Tenmongata}} under {{ill|Inō Tadataka|en|Inō Tadataka|qid=Q1240937|lt=Ino Tadataka|1=Inō Tadataka}} (born {{ill|1785|en|1785|qid=Q7756|lt=1785|1=1785}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|15|2|17|1|16|3|2|0216|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
